channel.title: GIS on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in GIS on Nature Works

item.title: Victory
item.description: Full steam ahead with the CAD for Gardeners online class, I did a run through of the video, looks like it’ll be more like 1. http://localhost:1313/blog/230109-victory/

item.title: GIS
item.description: GIS stands for Geographic Information System, software that can analyse data that has a geographic component. http://localhost:1313/blog/230107-gis/
